calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-11-2016 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Prove-Up Hearing;
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Leslie C. Nichols, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, CSR#6840.

Brandon Tang, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff, AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK, A UTAH STATE CHARTERED BANK,
No appearance by defaulted defendant THOMAS DUENSING AKA THOMAS P. DUENSING,
Default of Defendant has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant as follows:

Damages: $34,948.13
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0.00
Attorney's Fees: $0.00
Costs: $555.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $35,503.13

Order for Court's Acceptance Testimony By Declaration in Lieu of Live Testimony signed in open court.
Order for Court's Acceptance of Copies in Lieu of Originals signed in open court.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2016 Continued To Jul-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
